name: SpaghettETH Kitchen - Torino
tagline: Art & tech residency dedicated to decentralized music & video stack and Community building
description: A fully furnished studio room at the home of SpaghettETH’s co-founders, focused on exploring independent and self-sovereign models for organizing and monetizing music production, musicians’ livelihoods, and livestreaming. The space also serves as a hub for brainstorming and bootstrapping community initiatives and educational formats for the emerging tokenized world, with a focus on civic tech, public administration innovation, and decentralized democratic institutions.

spaces.name: Studio Room
spaces.notes: fully furnished A/V and music production studio + Software development

assets.name: Music Production tools
assets.notes: guitars, amps, keyboards, mics, synths & a Logic X DAW

assets.name: Raspberry Pi4
assets.notes: a raspberry Pi is a always a good piece of tech to have :)

challenges.title: SpaghettETH vertical help - funding and campaigns
challenges.problem_description: SpaghettETH runs events and educational formats on a yearly basis, we need someone to help us brainstorm new ideas regarding funding and new events formulas
challenges.expected_solution: new verticals that can provide funding streams for SpaghettETH Impact non profit

challenges.title: Web3radio.it - stage 2
challenges.problem_description: SpaghettETH developed this concept of a decentralized webradio. We would like to move it to a V2, but we constantly lack the headspace and time to do so. We would be happy to welcome someone able to work with us to bring this project to a maturity beyond the PoC stage
challenges.expected_solution: ideally, Web3radio v2 will be a new social stack laying the foundations for a Twitch-style, decentralized, audio-only social media managed by communities instead of individuals
